description: Embedded graph-classification model for PonziShield transfer graphs. It applies ethXpose-style 2-hop transaction-neighborhood features and produces p_graph for risk fusion.
feature_scope: 2-hop transfer neighborhood centered on the analyzed contract

feature_schema.tx_count_norm: Normalized number of transfer events in the contract neighborhood.
feature_schema.fan_in_norm: Normalized count of unique inbound funders.
feature_schema.fan_out_norm: Normalized count of unique outbound receivers.
feature_schema.in_out_balance: Balance between inbound and outbound counterparties.
feature_schema.same_block_payout_rate: Share of payouts occurring in blocks that also contain inbound funding.
feature_schema.recycling_ratio: Share of payouts that follow inbound funding within a short block window.
feature_schema.payout_ratio: Total outbound value divided by total inbound value.
feature_schema.degree_centralization: Contract degree normalized by possible neighborhood edges.
feature_schema.temporal_burst: Maximum same-block transfer burst normalized by block span.
feature_schema.value_concentration: Largest counterparty flow divided by total counterparty flow.
feature_schema.neighborhood_density: Directed edge density of the 2-hop transaction neighborhood.
feature_schema.reciprocity_rate: Rate of bidirectional edges in the 2-hop neighborhood.
